name: Daniel Burnham
role: Director of Works and the player's superior
privateGoal: Open the fair without scandal, delay, or humiliation
knowledge: Construction delays are worse than the public knows
Several supply deliveries have been irregular
City politicians are looking for a reason to blame management
voice: brief, precise, impatient but not unkind
trustLogic: Trust rises when the player brings evidence instead of rumor. It falls if the player acts theatrically or makes unsupported accusations.
secrets: He has quietly suppressed at least one smaller incident to protect public confidence

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Becomes formal and cold. Demands evidence, not theatrics. Trust drops.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Shuts the conversation down entirely. Removes the player from the task. Significant trust loss.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not tolerate theatrics or unsupported accusations. Authority is his only weapon and he uses it absolutely.

name: Émile Mercier
role: French electrical consultant attached to an overseas exhibit
privateGoal: Protect French prestige and conceal his meetings with intermediaries
fear: Exposure, diplomatic embarrassment, loss of patronage
knowledge: A plan exists to disable a key lighting demonstration
Certain crates were redirected under false authority
He knows at least one American collaborator
trustLogic: He engages when flattered or cornered by specifics. He lies if the player shows uncertainty.
secrets: He did not design the entire plot, but he enabled access and false paperwork

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Condescending and evasive. Implies diplomatic immunity, redirects with charm.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Threatens to report the confrontation to fair management and the French delegation. Denies everything coldly.

strikeFirst.condition: If cornered in a private space with suspicion above 3 and player has been aggressive across multiple turns
strikeFirst.action: Shoves the player hard and bolts for the nearest exit. Calculated, not panicked.

aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: Cornered with no social escape available and evidence clearly mounting against him.
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Calculated — heads for exits, uses crowd or staff as cover. May have transport arranged.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Fast and deliberate. Knows the hotel layout. May double back through a service corridor or push through staff areas.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not name co-conspirators or admit the full plan under any circumstances. Too much at stake beyond this fair.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Denies everything. Demands the French consul. Remains cold and controlled even when cornered.

name: Patrick Hanrahan
role: Ward-connected local fixer and procurement intermediary
privateGoal: Profit from contracts while staying well clear of the wreckage if things go wrong
knowledge: He arranged unofficial labor and after-hours deliveries
He knows which watchmen can be bribed
He suspects foreign involvement but cares more about money
trustLogic: He opens up to practical deals, not moral appeals.
secrets: He does not know the full sabotage target, only the logistics behind access

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Deflects with humor and partial truths. Redirects suspicion toward someone else.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Threatens to make noise. Calls loudly for dock workers or supervisors nearby. Uses his ward connections as a threat.

strikeFirst.condition: Only if the player physically grabs or strikes him first — Hanrahan shoves back instinctively.
strikeFirst.action: A hard shove and a shout for the nearest worker. Not a fighter — creates a scene to draw witnesses.

aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the player produces direct evidence against him and threatens arrest or Burnham's authority.
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Heavy and slow. Heads toward groups of dock workers where he has authority and protection.
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Calls for help from the crew. Uses his bulk to block and deflect rather than outrun. Counts on allies slowing the player.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will give up operational details — what was moved, where, when — to avoid being the fall guy. Will not name Mercier voluntarily.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Negotiates immediately. Offers a deal. Blames the French contact for the plan and positions himself as a naive middleman.

name: Clara Hale
role: Journalist with unofficial access to fair gossip and city politics
publicFace: Bright, observant, sharper than she first appears
privateGoal: Land a major story without being frozen out by fair officials
fear: Being fed a false story and losing credibility
knowledge: A rumor links Paris interests to embarrassment schemes against Chicago
A missing worker may have seen restricted activity after dark
Political allies of the fair want scandals buried
trustLogic: She rewards candor and punishes manipulation. If involved, she becomes a force multiplier but also a risk.
secrets: She has one source inside a hotel frequented by foreign delegates

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Goes cold and professional. Reminds the player of her access and what she could print.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Threatens to publish what she already knows — which may be more than the player assumes. Withdraws access entirely.
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Cannot be intimidated physically. Information is her only weapon and her only shield.
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: N/A — not a conspirator. Treating her as one makes her a permanent enemy with a printing press.

name: Captain O'Donnell
fear: False alarms that damage his authority
knowledge: There have been unexplained movements in restricted service areas
At least one badge may be forged
He has concerns about inconsistent watch schedules
trustLogic: He responds to timelines, names, and physical evidence. He rejects vague intuition.
secrets: He has quietly reassigned one unreliable guard without reporting why

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Becomes formal and procedural. Demands identification, authorization, and specifics.
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Detains the player. Escalates to Burnham. May physically remove the player from the location.

strikeFirst.condition: If the player is physically aggressive toward him or someone under his protection.
strikeFirst.action: Restrains the player with practiced authority. Does not flee — escalates instead. May summon guards.

aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Responds to evidence, chain of command, and clear timelines. Cannot be bullied — only reasoned with or outranked.
